node.text: Reminded me pf the time when i was a child amd every chaand raat baba used to take me to get chooriyan🥺🤍
Lucky you MashaAllah ❤️ May uncle live a long healthy life ameen 🫶
Not him clapping with pure happiness 🤧😭❤️
Mashallah you are so lucky to have such an amazing bond with your dad
I love how he was clapping with joy 🥹🎀
Bhai ap ko bhot shoke ha jummah wali post ka
@zayan_bin_hamid wo apki mama ky sath post krien gi jldi sy mama account bhnwao mai b sath kru ga 😝
Blue wali was the prettiest churiyan 💙
ہمیشہ دیر کر دیتا ہوں میں 🙂
Bald dads r the best😭😭😭😭😭😭 mine is bald too and i LOVEE HIMM❤️❤️❤️
Sadeed ka or ap ka kuch chal rha hy kea ??😁😂😂
@rosita_booh aghr un ka Kuch chal bhi rha ha tu wo publicly thori na btay ghi untill its permanent wla scene ni hota 😁
